introSection: Lokolo is a steel roller coaster built by Italian firm SBF Visa Group currently located at Lost Island Theme Park in Waterloo, Iowa, USA. The ride was installed by Swiss Ride Services.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Ride page on the park's website

fullText:
Lokolo is a steel roller coaster built by Italian firm SBF Visa Group currently located at Lost Island Theme Park in Waterloo, Iowa, USA. The ride was installed by Swiss Ride Services.


 * Ride page on the park's website
